title: Tags should be ordered based on ABC or a predefined order
excerpt: When I add a Tag column to a board and start adding a bunch of tags to an item (I have some that will have up to 10 in some cases), I would like them to be shown in alphabetical order or at least a predefined order (the …

posts.author: gwheat (Garrett)
posts.cookedHtml: When I add a Tag column to a board and start adding a bunch of tags to an item (I have some that will have up to 10 in some cases), I would like them to be shown in alphabetical order or at least a predefined order (the order the tags are listed perhaps). This would allow a quick glance to see what tags are missing per item.
